metadata.approach: Sub-agent-based live Claude experiment. Each of 12 (4 questions x 3 formats) tasks spawned a Claude Code sub-agent that was given ONLY a pre-built context file and asked to answer using no other sources.
limitations: Sub-agents carry Claude Code's system prompt overhead (total_tokens includes ~13K of harness overhead; context_tokens is the AICaC-relevant portion).
N=1 per cell (no repeat trials); accuracy is a deterministic-ish yes/no and durations are single-shot.
Sub-agent scheduling variance makes per-call latency noisy; trends hold across the small sample but absolute numbers should not be quoted as benchmarks.
